COURT TRIAL ON MAY-17-2010 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED ENTERED FOR THE PLAINTIFFS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT AS ORDERED BY THE COURT ON THE RECORD. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT THE ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE AFTER SUBMITTING A COOPY TO DEFENDANT. ALL EXHIBITS ORDERED RETAINED BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. HON. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IS ENTERED NUNC PRO TUNC FOR THE PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO POSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1240 FITZGERALD AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124. DEFENDANT MUST PAY PLAINTIFF ON THE COMPLAINT PAST DUE RENT $18,227.12, HOLDOVER DAMAGES $140.23/ DAY FROM AND AFTER 6/1/10, COSTS $668.00, PLUS ATTORNEYS; FEES IN SUM OF $10,551.25 , RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED, THE LEASE IS FORFIETED
